headline: HCA Healthcare Announces Agreement to Acquire The College of Health Care Professions
summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn. & HOUSTON, May 27, 2026--HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA), one of the nation’s leading healthcare providers, and The College of Health Care Professions (CHCP), one of the largest allied healthcare training providers in Texas, today announced an agreement for HCA Healthcare to acquire ownership of CHCP. CHCP provides healthcare education to more than 8,000 students annually across 10 campuses throughout Texas and online.
